title: 🦞 Best Chat App for OpenClaw: Telegram, Discord, or Slack?
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# Best Chat App for OpenClaw: Telegram, Discord, or Slack? Best chat app for OpenClaw compared: Telegram wins for most users, Discord for power users, Slack for teams. Best Chat App for OpenClaw: Telegram, Discord, or Slack? Read https://www.stack-junkie.com/blog/which-chat-app-works-best-with-openclaw and follow the instructions to help me with: Best Chat App for OpenClaw: Telegram, Discord, or Slack?. OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) connects to Telegram, Discord, Slack, Signal, WhatsApp, and several other platforms through a single gateway process. For running multiple channels at once (say, Telegram for personal use and Discord for a team), see OpenClaw multi-agent and multi-channel setup guide. Telegram is the fastest, most stable path to a working OpenClaw setup. There's no `openclaw channels login` step for Telegram. Full setup: OpenClaw Telegram Setup Guide. ## Slack setup for OpenClaw: Socket Mode and token requirements. Setup uses `openclaw channels login --channel whatsapp`, which launches a QR code scan on first run.

OpenClaw (often deployed as Clawdbot) is a pragmatic way to build those workflows: you combine skills, triggers, and policies so that routine operations can run consistently, while humans stay in control of approvals and exceptions. If the combination of OpenClaw and large models gives us an intelligent AI assistant, then Skills are its “hands.” Skills can further expand the capabilities of our already deployed OpenClaw. Note: If you haven’t deployed your own OpenClaw yet, I strongly recommend starting from the Tencent Cloud OpenClaw to get an OpenClaw instance up and running first, then return to this tutorial to explore.

content:

# How to Use Cron Jobs in OpenClaw to Automate Nightly Tasks Without Hitting Rate Limits | MindStudio. [Skip to main content](https://www.mindstudio.ai/blog/openclaw-cron-jobs-nightly-automation-rate-limits/#main-content)[![Image 4: MindStudio](https://www.mindstudio.ai/MindStudio-lockup-blk.svg)](https://www.mindstudio.ai/). [Blog](https://www.mindstudio.ai/blog)/How to Use Cron Jobs in OpenClaw to Automate Nightly Tasks Without Hitting Rate Limits. The fix isn’t a bigger plan — it’s scheduling cron jobs to run overnight, when your rolling quota window is clear. This guide walks through how to set up nightly cron jobs in OpenClaw, schedule them intelligently, and build in the error handling that overnight automation requires. Teams already using OpenClaw sometimes use MindStudio as an orchestration layer: OpenClaw handles specific task execution while a MindStudio background agent manages scheduling, sequencing between jobs, and error routing across the full overnight window. If you want a visual layer for managing scheduled background automation without maintaining cron infrastructure, [MindStudio’s autonomous background agents](https://mindstudio.ai/features/scheduled-agents) let you build and deploy nightly workflows through a no-code builder — with built-in support for sequencing, error handling, and 1,000+ integrations out of the box.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw: Setting Up Cron Jobs for Autonomous AI Task Scheduling
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

#### OpenClaw: Agentic AI for Developers. # Setting Up Cron Jobs. Explore how to configure cron jobs in OpenClaw to enable your AI assistant to perform scheduled tasks autonomously. Understand the difference between main session and isolated modes, learn to create, manage, and debug cron jobs, and discover practical uses like morning briefings and reminders. You send a message, and your agent responds. Cron jobs are the mechanism that makes this possible. They allow you to schedule your agent to execute tasks on a fixed rotation. ## How does the cron system work? Cron runs inside the Gateway, not inside the model. The Gateway wakes up at the right time, triggers the agent, and handles delivery. Jobs are stored at `~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json` and run history is logged per-job. If your Gateway is running, your cron jobs are running. Every cron job runs in one of two modes, and choosing the right one matters. The agent picks it up on the next heartbeat, ...

title: 🦞 OpenClaw cron scheduler guide for proactive automations
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

Cron is for tasks that need a precise schedule or tasks you want to keep out of your main conversation history. OpenClaw keeps cron job definitions on disk and it keeps per-run history separately. OpenClaw cron supports three scheduling patterns and you pick based on the job you’re building. A main session cron job drops a system event into your main session then the agent processes it with full context. An isolated job runs a dedicated agent turn in its own session. A cron job can run and do nothing visible or it can deliver output to a channel. ## Creating cron jobs via chat. The agent can convert that into a cron schedule plus an isolated message payload plus delivery targeting. Create an isolated cron job with a cron expression like `0 7 * * *` and set announce delivery to your preferred channel and target. ### Why did my cron job not run?

content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw Tip #2: Set Up Cron Jobs for Automated Daily Tasks. OpenClaw cron job automation - futuristic clock mechanism with digital circuits. One of OpenClaw’s most powerful features is its built-in **cron job scheduler**. ## How OpenClaw Cron Jobs Work. Cron jobs run inside the Gateway process, not the AI model itself. Jobs are persisted at `~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json`, so they survive restarts. ## Creating Your First Cron Job. ## Useful Cron Job Ideas. ## Managing Cron Jobs. # Run a job manually. openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>. openclaw cron delete <job-id>`. **Pro tip:** Schedule resource-intensive cron jobs during off-peak hours (late night) to avoid hitting API rate limits during your active working hours. ##### Michael So Shares AI Publication at Hong Kong Legislative Council with Councilors Lau Chi-pang and Chan Hok-fung. ##### From 0 to 1 Deploying WuKong: Standard SOP for Enterprise AI Implementation. ##### Why Enterprises Need WuKong: Three Major Pain Points of AI Transformation and How to Break Through.
